description: Composition Brown round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has three quarter sleeves and graphic print on the chest Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery wrangler's flair for understated and focussed minimalism is on display in this T-shirt. The label has the ability to polish classic pieces with a contemporary vibe, and this time they've brought a music industry inspired style back in vogue with this tee. Wear this with classic denims, a denim jacket and colourful canvas shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
